keynotes.text: Calc. bro. is an unproved remedy, recommended by Hale in a variety of children's complaints. Suited to children who are of lax fibre, lymphatic, nervous, and irritable. As both Bromine and Calcarea are suited to fair-haired and fat children the combination appears to intensify the effect. Gastric, intestinal, and cerebral irritation in such children. Vomiting, diarrhœa, sleeplessness, fretfulness, and tendency to brain disease.

generalities.text: Clinical: Brain, congestion of; Fretfulness; Irritability; Sleeplessness
